summary: Plan-only assessment of five open PR inventory items. No merge action is safe because none has a complete merge preflight with resolved review/bot comments, current mergeability, and passed Codex /review proof. #89428 has a narrow, executable repair artifact; the other PRs need maintainer/preflight decisions before merge or closeout.

actions.reason: Merge is blocked by missing required merge preflight proof and unknown current mergeability, not by duplicate classification.
Maintainer judgment is needed to decide whether #88906 has unique work beyond the merged #89133 path or should be closed/superseded in a separate close-enabled run.
The PR looks focused, but merge cannot be recommended without required merge preflight proof.
Concrete narrow repair is available: carry currentInboundContext into the early-return runtimeContext path and add a regression test before revalidation/review.
Dirty merge state plus missing merge preflight proof blocks merge recommendation; maintainer should decide whether to rebase/repair this contributor branch in a dedicated finalization job.
A single narrow contributor-branch repair path is concrete and safe to hand to the executor.

needs_human: #70046: missing complete merge preflight and current mergeability proof before merge.
#88906: broad XL provider/auth/runtime change with active author follow-up and possible overlap with merged #89133 requires maintainer decision on unique remaining value.
#89367: focused PR but missing complete merge preflight and Codex /review proof.
#90672: dirty merge state and missing merge preflight proof; decide whether to run a dedicated rebase/repair finalization job.
